ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the Forex broker */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Review score out of 5 */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulatory authority governing the broker */,
  "spreads" TEXT /* Details about spreads and commissions */,
  "assets" TEXT /* Number and types of assets offered */,
  "advantages" TEXT /* List of advantages for using the broker */,
  "open_account" TEXT /* Information on how to open an account */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the broker's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the broker was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the broker's headquarters */,
  "customer_support" TEXT /* Details about customer support (e.g., live chat, phone, email) */,
  "user_base" INTEGER /* Number of active users */,
  "trading_platforms" TEXT /* List of trading platforms supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory authority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation and its significance */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the regulatory authority is based */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued by the regulatory authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreads" (
  "spread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spread entry */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker offering the spread */,
  "spread_details" TEXT /* Details about the specific spreads offered */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., currency pairs, commodities) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the spread information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreads_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset entry */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker offering the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., currency pairs, commodities) */,
  "asset_count" INTEGER /* Number of assets available */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advantages" (
  "advantage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advantage entry */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker associated with the advantage */,
  "advantage_description" TEXT /* Description of the advantage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the advantage information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advantage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advantages_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "trading_experience" TEXT /* User's trading experience level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_reviews_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_assets" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_assets_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_spreads" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spread mapping */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker offering the spread */,
  "spread_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spread details */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the spread mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_spreads_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_spreads_spread_id FOREIGN KEY ("spread_id") REFERENCES spreads ("spread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_advantages" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advantage mapping */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker offering the advantage */,
  "advantage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advantage description */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the advantage mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_advantages_advantage_id FOREIGN KEY ("advantage_id") REFERENCES advantages ("advantage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_advantages_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_regulations" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation mapping */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulation authority */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the regulation mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_regulations_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_regulations_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broker_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker offering the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., live, demo) */,
  "minimum_deposit" REAL /* Minimum deposit required to open the account */,
  "leverage" TEXT /* Maximum leverage offered for the account type */,
  "trading_fees" TEXT /* Details about trading fees (e.g., commission, swaps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broker_accounts_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, review submission) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
